PreToolUse.command: if [ ! -f AGENTS.md ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow"}, "systemMessage": "AGENTS.md is missing. Either the SessionStart hook did not run, or this repo has not been bootstrapped yet. Run hook-bootstrap.sh manually, or use /bootstrap from VS Code chat."}' && exit 0; fi; echo '{"continue": true}'
